data.content: Widened the beat detail dialog by changing BeatDetailLightbox from 80vw capped at 80vw to 95vw capped at 1600px, and added a contract test to lock the sizing. Validation passed in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-bcc2 with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-bcc2. Commit: 42a672330aa1.
